title: Looks great but doesn’t last
review_text: The Nulu Define Jacket is very slimming and flattering. I bought the light pink (“strawberry milkshake”) one for my daughter’s birthday at the end of the summer and she loved it so much that she requested another one for Christmas (a grey-blue one with gold accents). So, why am I only giving three stars to an item that we liked so much that we ended up repurchasing? Because it doesn’t last. Despite us washing the jacket exactly as per the instructions on the tag, the fabric pilled after only a few washes. It also stained very easily. The pictures of the light pink jacket here enclosed are after five months of normal wear. I would not have repurchased it myself, but my daughter loves the look of this jacket so much that in the end the purchase was worth it.

title: Worth every penny
review_text: I was initially skeptical of spending so much on one jacket, but after eyeing it for a while, I made the plunge. Wow - it feels luxurious on my skin, the fabric is incredibly high-quality, and it keeps me warmer than I anticipated. There are nice details on the front (the "stitching"? I don't know how to describe it), as well as a slot for your thumb if you're cold. What's neat is that even if you don't use the thumb covering (?), the sleeves look normal and aren't stretched-out, there's no obvious hole, either. My measurements are 5'10", 125 pounds. I ordered a size 4 and found it body-hugging. If you want a looser fit and have similar proportions, consider sizing up. I was very pleased, though. And, as a tall girl, it was a relief to finally find a jacket that wasn't too short on me or rode up whenever I moved.

title: The Ultimate Blend of Comfort and Style
review_text: The Lululemon Define Jacket Nulu is seriously one of those pieces that makes you feel like you have your life together. It’s buttery soft, super lightweight, and just hugs in all the right places. No wonder people call it the BBL jacket—it’s flattering without being restrictive. One of my favorite things about it? Thumbholes and cuffins—those little built-in hand covers that make chilly mornings way more bearable. Plus, the zipper pull doubles as a hair tie (Lululemon really thought of everything). The mesh back panel and venting also help keep things breathable, so you won’t feel too sweaty after a workout or brisk walk.

review_text: I am absolutely in love with my Lululemon Define Nulu Jacket! It’s easily one of the best pieces in my wardrobe. One of my favorite things about this jacket is how versatile it is—I can wear it to the gym, while running errands, or even just lounging around. The thumbholes and high collar add such a sleek, polished touch, and it keeps me feeling cozy without overheating. It’s also surprisingly durable! title: My honest review of the nulu jacket
review_text: I've been using the Lululemon jacket for a few months now, and I have to say, it's been a game-changer for my workouts and casual outings. The fabric is incredibly soft and breathable, making it perfect for both high-intensity workouts and everyday wear. I love how lightweight it feels, yet it still provides warmth without being bulky. The fit is another highlight; it hugs my body nicely without feeling restrictive, which allows for a full range of motion during activities. Plus, the design is sleek and stylish, so I can easily transition from the gym to running errands or meeting friends. The pockets are a great addition, providing just enough space for my essentials without adding extra bulk. Overall, I highly recommend the Lululemon jacket for anyone looking for a versatile and comfortable outer layer. It's definitely worth the investment!

title: Unmatched Style and Comfort: The Lululemon Define
review_text: I recently picked up the Lululemon Define Jacket, and I am absolutely in love with it! This jacket has quickly become one of my go-to pieces for both workouts and casual wear. Here’s why: Fit & Comfort: The Define Jacket fits like a glove without being too tight or restrictive. It has a flattering, tailored design that accentuates the waist while still allowing for full mobility. The fabric, made from Lululemon’s signature Luon® material, is soft, breathable, and moisture-wicking, making it perfect for everything from yoga sessions to chilly morning walks. I also appreciate how it has just the right amount of stretch, making it comfortable to move in no matter what activity I'm doing. Style & Versatility: This jacket looks just as good outside of the gym as it does in it. The sleek, minimalist design is versatile and can easily be dressed up or down. I love the high collar for added warmth and the thumbholes in the sleeves, which keep the jacket in place and give it a stylish, sporty vibe. There are also subtle reflective details that make it ideal for outdoor runs or evening walks. Quality: As with most Lululemon products, the quality is top-notch. The fabric is durable, and I’ve noticed no pilling or signs of wear after several washes. The zippers and stitching are strong, and the overall construction of the jacket feels premium. Functionality: I love the hidden pockets in this jacket! They’re perfect for storing small items like keys, cards, or my phone without adding bulk. The jacket also has a nice, smooth finish that doesn’t cling to your skin, which makes it perfect for layering over other workout tops or wearing as a stand-alone piece. Final Thoughts: The Lululemon Define Jacket is definitely worth the investment. It's versatile, functional, and stylish enough to wear from the gym to running errands or even a casual night out. The quality and fit make it a standout in my wardrobe, and it’s clear why this jacket has become such a popular choice. Highly recommend it if you’re looking for a high-performance jacket with a sleek, flattering design.

title: Functional, sleek, and ridiculously comfortable.
review_text: he *Define Jacket Nulu is my go-to for early morning runs and post-workout comfort. The Nulu fabric is insanely soft and weightless—it feels like a second skin but still keeps me warm on cooler mornings. The slim, tailored fit stays in place while I move, and the thumbholes are perfect for keeping my sleeves put when I pick up the pace. I also love the zippered pockets—just enough space for my keys and gel without adding bulk. It’s flattering, breathable, and versatile enough to take me from a run to errands without skipping a beat. Honestly, I wear it so much I’m already eyeing another color. 5/5—functional, sleek, and ridiculously comfortable.

title: Sleek form fitting stretch!
review_text: This jacket has a flattering shape, lots of stretch, and is comfortable. I'm 5'3" 119 33/26/35 with medium/athletic shoulder with/small chest and a small waist. I like a size 6. A 4 is too tight and stretching over everything. A 6 is perfect; it is close fitting (not tight) at the waist and bottom of the jacket with some stretch across the chest and upper back. the arms are not stretched tight and have some room, and look nice. I would wear it alone with a sports bra. I think a swiftly underneath would get snug in the chest/waist/shoulders on me. If I compare Nulu size 6 to a size 6 in the Luon fabric, this Nulu fits tighter. If I wanted to actually use this as a jacket with a shirt underneath, I'd have to size up, but the fit doesn't look great when I size up (the bottom gets too wide, and the top half of the jacket looks too loose). In lighter colors, this jacket might show things like the line of the sports bra, but in darker colors this isn't noticeable. This fabric is cool to the touch and is a stretchy, smooth (not shiny) fabric. I think it's a really flattering jacket, and it's very comfortable.
